description_long: This is a two-tiered celebratory cake displayed on a rustic wooden board. The cake is generously covered in white icing, with a decorative arrangement of strawberries, blueberries, and chocolate shards adorning both tiers. The lower tier features a ring of sliced strawberries and blueberries, while the upper tier is topped with a mound of whipped cream and a single whole strawberry. A small festive card with the word 'Gefeliciteerd' and colorful bunting is attached to the side, suggesting a congratulatory occasion. The overall appearance is festive and homemade, with a slightly rustic and playful decoration style. The cake's surface is soft and creamy, with visible fruit and chocolate accents providing texture and color contrast.
description: A two-tiered, white-iced cake decorated with strawberries, blueberries, chocolate shards, and a celebratory card, set on a wooden board. The cake has a festive, rustic appearance with vibrant fruit accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cake's two tiers, prominent fruit decorations, and the wooden board base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered fruit and chocolate decorations, with the celebratory card partially visible.
description_view_2: Angled view focusing on the card reading 'Gefeliciteerd' and the colorful bunting, with fruit and chocolate details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back arrangement of strawberries, blueberries, and chocolate shards, with less emphasis on the card.
